text:
Dale was a giant that appeared in the episode "Meeseeks and Destroy", he had a wife and was the father of their unnamed son.

When Rick Sanchez and Morty Smith entered in his house, Dale came into the kitchen and suspected something. As he walked he slipped, and bashed his head on the corner of a table, killing him. When his wife with their son came in, the woman saw her husband's lifeless body and subsequently accused the pair of murder.
